title: You Never Can Tell
writer: Helmer Walton Bergman, Grace Lovell Bryan, Thomas J. Geraghty
actors: Bebe Daniels, Jack Mulhall, Edward Martindel
plot: Rowena Jones attracts the attention of wealthy playboy William Vaughn, when trying on an expensive fur coat belonging to one of the guests at the hotel where she works as a hat check. Determined to marry a millionaire in order to ...
